homeTitle: Chicago Tours | Self-Guided Black History, Culture & Walking Routes
homeDescription: Explore Black Chicago through self-guided walking tours with maps, narration, and routes across Bronzeville, migration history, South Side arts, political power, and neighborhood change.
catalogTitle: Chicago Walking Tours | Black History & Culture Routes
catalogDescription: Browse self-guided Chicago routes built around Bronzeville, Great Migration history, South Side culture, Black political power, and neighborhood memory.
homePanelTitle: See Chicago through movement, memory, and South Side power.
homePanelBody: Start with a self-guided route through Black Metropolis landmarks, migration and housing struggle, South Side arts institutions, civic power, and the neighborhoods where Chicago keeps changing.
homePanelHighlights: South Side arts and civic landmarks
